arts.ttl: Endrick showed 'courage' on 1st Madrid UCL goal
arts.sum: Carlo Ancelotti said Endrick "has balls" after the Real Madrid forward, 18, scored his first Champions League goal from distance -- despite having Vinicius Junior and Kylian Mbappé as passing options.

arts.ttl: Ancelotti: “Thibaut Courtois is the best goalkeeper in the world right now”
arts.sum: Real Madrid coach Carlo Ancelotti spoke to the media after the team’s 3-1 win over Stuttgart on Tuesday in the Champions League, where he talked about Thibaut Courtois’ greatness, about which he said: “I can make a list [of great goalkeepers I have coached]. I have coached more than two hundred Champions League matches and I do not remember not suffering, ever...”

arts.ttl: Fuming Undav laments "shitty set-piece goal" after Real Madrid defeat
arts.sum: Deniz Undav was visibly frustrated that Stuttgart came away empty-handed from their away game against Real Madrid despite making the reigning champions fight hard for their three points.

arts.ttl: ‘He has balls’ – Carlo Ancelotti hails Real Madrid youngster after win over Stuttgart
arts.sum: Real Madrid head coach Carlo Ancelotti has late on Tuesday moved to praise an up-and-coming member of his side’s frontline. This comes owing to his efforts in Real’s latest outing.…

arts.ttl: Sebastian Hoeness: Stuttgart "can be proud" despite loss to Real Madrid
arts.sum: Sebastian Hoeness was proud of his Stuttgart side despite coming away empty-handed against Real Madrid.

arts.ttl: Harry Kane breaks records on Champions League return as Liverpool, Aston Villa and Real Madrid all win
arts.sum: Kane scored four as Bayern ran riot against Dinamo Zagreb with Kylian Mbappe scoring for Real

arts.ttl: Endrick scores 1st UCL goal to cap late Madrid win
arts.sum: Real Madrid started their Champions League title defence with a hard-fought 3-1 home win over Stuttgart on Tuesday thanks to late goals by Antonio Ruediger and Endrick which cancelled out Deniz Undav's equaliser.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid sensation Endrick ignored 2 of world football’s best to net first UCL goal
arts.sum: Real Madrid starlet Endrick showcased all of his confidence, in opening his account in European competition on Tuesday night. Real, of course, marked their return to action a short time…

arts.ttl: What is Real Madrid’s next Champions League game? UCL fixtures and schedule
arts.sum: Carlo Ancelotti’s side fear no one when it comes to continental competition but they have been drawn against some genuine European heavyweights in the first iteration of the new-look Champions League . Real Madrid claimed their 15th European crown earlier this year, beating Borussia Dortmund in the Champions League final to complete a famous double.

arts.ttl: Real Madrid star overtakes Barcelona icon Ronaldinho in UCL record books
arts.sum: A head-turning statistic surrounding the production of a leading member of the attacking ranks at La Liga giants Real Madrid has on Tuesday night come to the fore online. The…
